text: I feel as though I am in a liminal zone where the sterile emptiness of the first room contrasts with the vibrant intellectual curiosity of the second. The beanbags invite relaxation, an open canvas for contemplation, while the R+D exhibit sparks questions about the convergence of humanity and technology, progress and coexistence. Surrounded by potential and purpose, I hover between anticipation and reflection—curious, alert, yet strangely at ease.
